name: Ajisai Sena
description: **Height:** 158 cm (5'2") She is sometimes referred to as an "angel" because of her easygoing personality. Sena's parents frequently leave her home to care for her two younger brothers, Kou-kun and Kii-kun. Although she loves her brothers, she grows resentful of the restrictions it places on her freedom as she is left to look after them on a more regular basis.

name: Porco Rosso
description: Born Marco Pagot, Porco was an ace fighter pilot for the Italian Air Force in World War I. A curse has since given him the appearance of a pig, leading to the nickname Porco Rosso (Italian for "Red Pig"). He now operates as a bounty hunter in the Adriatic Sea, fighting air pirates in his distinctive red sea plane.

name: Ryou Saeba
description: Ryou is a combat expert, having fought as a guerrilla in numerous conflicts alluded to throughout the series, and has a long history of working in the underground. He carries a Colt Python. His mysterious past starts with him being the only survivor of a plane crash in Central America as a toddler. The crash left him an orphan in a rebel village during a civil war, prompting him to learn to fight at a young age. name: Juno
description: __Species:__ Gray wolf Juno is one of the five main characters of Beastars and is a member of the drama club on the actor team. A feminine, affable wolf, she wishes to become the next Beastar, competing against Louis.

name: Tama

name: John
description: John is a male armadillo and a familiar of Draluc. He understands human language, but is unable to speak. As only Draluc can understand him, John uses gestures and signs to communicate with others. He gained immortality after officially becoming Draluc's familiar.
